prompts: Write a Synoema program where main returns the integer 42.
Create a simple Synoema program that defines main as the number 100.
Write a Synoema constant: main equals 7.
Define a Synoema program with main = 0.
Write main that returns a negative number in Synoema: main = 0 - 5.
Create a Synoema program: main = 999.
Write a trivial Synoema program returning 1.
Define main as the literal 256 in Synoema.
Synoema program: main should be 12345.
Write a one-line Synoema program where main equals 10.
Write a Synoema function double that takes x and returns x * 2.
Create a Synoema function add that takes x and y and returns x + y.
Define a function square in Synoema: square x = x * x.
Write a Synoema function that computes x * x + 1.
Create triple x = x * 3 in Synoema and call it from main.
Write a Synoema function inc x = x + 1 and main = inc 5.
Define sub x y = x - y in Synoema with main = sub 10 3.
Write a Synoema program with avg x y = (x + y) / 2 and main = avg 10 20.
Create a Synoema function negate x = 0 - x with main = negate 7.
Write a Synoema function that computes the remainder: rem x y = x % y, main = rem 10 3.
Write a recursive factorial function in Synoema using pattern matching: fac 0 = 1, fac n = n * fac (n - 1).
Implement factorial in Synoema with pattern matching on 0 and n.
Create a Synoema factorial function and compute fac 10 in main.
Write Synoema code for factorial using recursion. Base case: fac 0 = 1.
Define a recursive factorial in Synoema. Call it with fac 5 in main.
Implement fac in Synoema: fac 0 = 1, fac n = n * fac (n - 1), main = fac 7.
Write a factorial function in Synoema that multiplies n by fac of n minus 1.
Create Synoema code: recursive factorial with main = fac 12.
Write a Synoema program computing 10 factorial using pattern matching.
Implement factorial recursively in Synoema. Include a main binding.
Write a map function in Synoema: map f [] = [], map f (x:xs) = f x : map f xs.
Implement a length function for lists in Synoema: len [] = 0, len (_:xs) = 1 + len xs.
Write a Synoema function sum that sums a list: sum [] = 0, sum (x:xs) = x + sum xs.
Create a Synoema filter function using cons pattern matching.
Write a Synoema function head that returns the first element: head (x:xs) = x.
Implement append in Synoema: append [] ys = ys, append (x:xs) ys = x : append xs ys.
Write a Synoema function that reverses a list using an accumulator.
Create a Synoema function last that returns the last element of a list.
Write take n in Synoema: take 0 _ = [], take n (x:xs) = x : take (n - 1) xs.
Implement zip in Synoema that pairs elements from two lists.
Write a Synoema program that concatenates two strings with ++.
Create a Synoema function greet name = "Hello " ++ name.
Write a Synoema program using show to convert a number to a string.
Create a Synoema program: main = "foo" ++ "bar".
Write a Synoema function that builds a greeting: greet n = "Hi " ++ show n.
Define a Synoema program with string interpolation: main = "value: ${show 42}".
Write a Synoema program: label x = "x = " ++ show x, main = label 10.
Create a Synoema function repeat that concatenates a string with itself.
Write a Synoema program that uses ++ to join three strings.
Define msg = "hello" ++ " " ++ "world" in Synoema with main = msg.
Write a Synoema program with records: point x y = {x = x, y = y}, main = (point 3 4).x.
Create a Synoema record for a person with name and age fields.
Write a Synoema function that creates a record and accesses its field with dot notation.
Define a 2D point record in Synoema and compute dist_sq p = p.x * p.x + p.y * p.y.
Write Synoema code: circle r = {radius = r}, area c = c.radius * c.radius, main = area (circle 5).
Create a Synoema record pair a b = {fst = a, snd = b} and extract fst.
Write a Synoema function that takes a record and returns the sum of its x and y fields.
Define a color record in Synoema: rgb r g b = {r = r, g = g, b = b}.
Write Synoema code that creates nested records and accesses inner fields.
Create a Synoema record with three fields and access each one in main.
Define Maybe a = Just a | None in Synoema and write fromMaybe that extracts the value.
Write a Synoema ADT: Shape = Circle Int | Rect Int Int, with an area function.
Create a Synoema Bool ADT and implement not: not True = False, not False = True.
Define Either a b = Left a | Right b in Synoema with a pattern matching function.
Write a Synoema ADT for a simple expression tree: Expr = Num Int | Add Expr Expr.
Create Synoema code with Color = Red | Green | Blue and a show_color function.
Define a Synoema List ADT: List a = Cons a (List a) | Nil, with a length function.
Write Synoema ADT: Ordering = LT | EQ | GT, and compare function.
Create a Synoema Option type and implement map_option that applies a function inside Just.
Define a Synoema Pair type: Pair a b = MkPair a b, with fst and snd extractors.
Write a Synoema function apply f x = f x and use it with a lambda: main = apply (\x -> x + 1) 5.
Create a compose function in Synoema: compose f g x = f (g x).
Write a Synoema program using pipe: main = 5 |> double |> inc.
Define twice f x = f (f x) in Synoema and apply it to double.
Write a Synoema program with a lambda that squares: main = (\x -> x * x) 7.
Create a Synoema function flip f x y = f y x.
Write Synoema code using pipes to chain three operations.
Define on f g x y = f (g x) (g y) in Synoema.
Write a Synoema program: const x _ = x, main = const 42 0.
Create a Synoema program that maps a lambda over a list: main = map (\x -> x * 2) [1 2 3].
Write quicksort in Synoema using list comprehensions for partitioning.
Implement qsort in Synoema: qsort [] = [], qsort (p:xs) uses lo and hi with list comprehensions.
Create a Synoema quicksort that partitions with [x | x <- xs , x <= p].
Write a complete quicksort in Synoema and sort [5 3 8 1 9 2 7 4 6].
Implement sorting in Synoema using recursive quicksort with ++ for concatenation.
Write Synoema quicksort with where-bindings for lo and hi partitions.
Create a Synoema qsort function using list comprehensions and test on [3 1 4 1 5 9].
Implement quicksort in Synoema: base case empty list, recursive case with pivot.
Write a Synoema sorting function using the quicksort algorithm with list comprehension filters.
Create Synoema code: qsort partitions around pivot using <= and > filters, concatenates with ++.
Write a Synoema module Math with functions square, cube, and abs. Use it with use Math (square cube abs).
Create a Synoema module with type signatures and function definitions.
Write a Synoema module Vec2 with make, add, and dot functions for 2D vectors using records.
Define a Synoema module StringUtils with helper functions and use it in main.
Write a Synoema module with type signatures: add : Int -> Int -> Int.
Create a Synoema module Prelude with id, const, and compose functions.
Write a Synoema module List with map, filter, and fold functions.
Define a Synoema module Geometry with point creation and distance functions.
Write a Synoema module Math with pi, square, and abs, then use all three in main.
Create a complete Synoema module with at least 3 functions and demonstrate use.
